name: Yipinhong Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd
summary: Yipinhong Pharmaceutical Co.,Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research and development, production, and sale of pharmaceutical products. It offers anti-infection, pediatric, cardiovascular, genitourinary, respiratory, liver and digestion, and dermatological products, as well as anti-inflammatory and analgesic products. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
